result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts

We've all been there: a new document, a blinking cursor, and that quiet dread of the blank page. You know roughly what you want to say — you just need somewhere to start. That's the friction we set out to remove. **Smart Drafts** turns the hardest part of writing (the first line) into the easiest.

Here's how it works: open a new document, give it a title, and click **Smart Draft**. We'll generate a tailored outline in seconds, drawing on your title and the recent context of what you and your team have been working on. Think of it as a thoughtful colleague who's read the room — suggesting a structure you can accept, tweak, or toss entirely. You're always in the driver's seat; we just make sure the car's already running.

This is the first step in a bigger direction. Next up: **custom voice training**, so Smart Drafts don't just sound coherent — they sound like *you*. Whether that's your personal cadence or your team's house style, we want every draft to feel less like a template and more like a head start. Give Smart Drafts a try on your next doc, and let us know what you think. As always, thank you for building with us.

Here's how it works: open a new document, give it a title, and click **Smart Draft**. Think of it as a thoughtful colleague who's read the room — suggesting a structure you can accept, tweak, or toss entirely. This is the first step in a bigger direction. Next up: **custom voice training**, so Smart Drafts don't just sound coherent — they sound like *you*.
